title: A lesson about recycling
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Yesterday, our teacher gave us a lesson about recycling and protecting the environment. She explained that huge amounts (27) rubbish are thrown away every day, even though many materials could be reused. During the lesson, we worked (28) small groups and discussed ways of reducing waste at school. One student suggested bringing reusable bottles instead of buying plastic ones every day. I agreed because it seemed more sensible (29) continuing to create unnecessary waste. Later, the teacher showed us a short documentary about pollution in the oceans. I was shocked (30) the amount of plastic floating in the water. At the end of the class, we were asked to design posters encouraging other students to recycle more often. I think lessons like this are useful (31) helping young people understand environmental problems. Our teacher said she hoped we would think more carefully (32) what we throw away in future.
